title: MC Paint
description: Datapack that lets you create and place custom paintings in-game
body:
# MC Paint Welcome to MC Paint! For a full explanation of all content, check out the official [wiki](https://github.com/Eroxen/MC-Paint-datapack/wiki). MC Paint is a datapack that lets you create custom paintings in-game. It does this by making use of [text displays](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Display) with a custom [font](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Font) to render coloured text as the pixels of a custom drawing. The datapack is designed to be simple to use, and fully survival-friendly.


Create your own art gallery!

The pack adds a Studio block, which lets you create paintings. You can also export these as Custom Paintings which you can place anywhere, even on floors and ceilings! There are also many [customisation options](https://github.com/Eroxen/MC-Paint-datapack/wiki/Custom-Painting-Modifiers) which lets you decorate in just the right way for you.


What mysteries unfold in this treacherous swamp?


You can use MC Paint in 6 different languages!

# FAQ ### Where can I find the resource pack on Modrinth?

Clicking the green download button on Modrinth only downloads the datapack. To find the resource pack, click on the version, scroll down to 'Files', and download the resource pack.
